description_long: This is a high-performance athletic running shoe with a streamlined, aerodynamic silhouette and a predominantly orange mesh upper. The shoe features white and gray synthetic overlays for structural support, with black and blue accent details along the lacing system. The midsole is thick and white, designed for cushioning and shock absorption, while the outsole is black with a rugged tread for enhanced grip. Branding elements, including the Salomon name and S-LAB series, are prominently displayed on the sides and heel. The shoe is equipped with a quick-lace system, and the overall construction suggests durability and comfort for urban or trail running.
description: A high-performance orange running shoe with white and gray overlays, rugged black outsole, and Salomon branding. Features a quick-lace system and thick cushioned sole.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the gray heel counter, Salomon branding, and the white midsole with black outsole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange mesh upper, white and gray overlays, and visible Salomon branding.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the streamlined toe, quick-lace system, and the S logo on the tongue.
description_view_3: Right side view with S-LAB branding, orange mesh, and the structural overlays clearly visible.
attribute_logo: White 'S' on orange tongue, white 'Salomon' text on heel and side, white 'S-LAB' on lateral side
